summary: School Logos Feature Test Complete - All 10 features verified successfully. 22px UniversityLogo components added to left of each row in Next Actions (5), Coming Up (1), and On Track (1) sections. Logos use rounded-md class for rounded square shape. On Track logos wrapped with opacity 0.6 for muted effect. Action text remains primary (font-weight: 700) with school name following after '—' dash separator.
critical_code_review_comments: UniversityLogo component correctly uses data-testid='logo-{domain}' pattern for testing
HighRow and MedRow use gap: 10 for consistent spacing between logo and text
LowRow correctly wraps logo in div with style={{ opacity: 0.6 }} for muted effect
All rows maintain flexbox layout with alignItems: center for vertical alignment
Logo size prop set to 22 (within 20-24px spec) across all row types
context_for_next_testing_agent: School logos feature fully implemented. UniversityLogo component at 22px with rounded-md class appears to left of each row. Current data: 5 high items (Next Actions), 1 medium (Coming Up), 1 low (On Track). Logo domains include ufl.edu, emory.edu, stanford.edu, ucla.edu. On Track section uses opacity wrapper (0.6) for muted logos. Priority/Pipeline toggle and On Track collapsible both working.
